hooks.command: file=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | grep -o '"file_path":\s*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"/\1/'); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -q '\.py$'; then if command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1; then ruff check --fix "$file" 2>/dev/null; fi; if command -v black >/dev/null 2>&1; then black -q "$file" 2>/dev/null; fi; fi

PostToolUse.description: Auto-format Python files with ruff and black after edits

hooks.command: file=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | grep -o '"file_path":\s*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"/\1/'); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -q '\.py$'; then if command -v mypy >/dev/null 2>&1; then mypy --no-error-summary "$file" 2>/dev/null | head -20; fi; fi

PostToolUse.description: Run mypy type checking after editing Python files

hooks.command: file=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | grep -o '"file_path":\s*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"/\1/'); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -q '\.py$'; then if grep -n 'print(' "$file" 2>/dev/null | grep -v '#.*print' | head -5; then echo '[WARNING] print() statements detected - consider using logging module'; fi; fi

PostToolUse.description: Warn about print() statements in edited Python files

hooks.command: file=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | grep -o '"file_path":\s*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"/\1/'); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -q '\.tf$'; then if command -v terraform >/dev/null 2>&1; then terraform fmt "$file" 2>/dev/null && echo "[terraform] fmt applied to $file"; fi; fi

PostToolUse.description: Auto-format Terraform files with terraform fmt after edits

hooks.command: file=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | grep -o '"file_path":\s*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"/\1/'); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -q '\.tf$'; then if command -v tflint >/dev/null 2>&1; then tflint --chdir=$(dirname "$file") 2>/dev/null | head -20; fi; fi

PostToolUse.description: Run tflint on Terraform files after edits

hooks.command: file=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | grep -o '"file_path":\s*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"/\1/'); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(yaml|yml)$'; then if command -v kubeconform >/dev/null 2>&1; then if grep -q 'apiVersion:' "$file" 2>/dev/null; then kubeconform -strict -ignore-missing-schemas -kubernetes-version 1.30.0 "$file" 2>/dev/null | head -20; fi; fi; fi

PostToolUse.description: Validate Kubernetes YAML with kubeconform after edits

hooks.command: file=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | grep -o '"file_path":\s*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"/\1/'); if [ -n "$file" ]; then if command -v checkov >/dev/null 2>&1; then if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(tf|yaml|yml)$'; then checkov -f "$file" --quiet --compact --severity HIGH 2>/dev/null | tail -20; fi; fi; fi

PostToolUse.description: Run checkov security scan on Terraform and Kubernetes files after edits

hooks.command: changed=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep '\.py$' || true); if [ -n "$changed" ]; then for f in $changed; do if grep -n 'print(' "$f" 2>/dev/null | grep -v '#.*print' | head -3; then echo "[WARNING] print() in $f - use logging"; fi; if grep -n 'import pdb' "$f" 2>/dev/null; then echo "[WARNING] pdb import in $f - remove before commit"; fi; if grep -n 'breakpoint()' "$f" 2>/dev/null; then echo "[WARNING] breakpoint() in $f - remove before commit"; fi; done; fi

Stop.description: Check for debug statements in modified Python files

hooks.command: if command -v gitleaks >/dev/null 2>&1; then gitleaks protect --staged --no-banner 2>/dev/null; exit_code=$?; if [ $exit_code -ne 0 ]; then echo '[SECURITY] gitleaks detected potential secrets in staged files - review before commit'; fi; fi

Stop.description: Scan staged files for secrets with gitleaks before session end

hooks.command: changed_tf=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep '\.tf$' || true); if [ -n "$changed_tf" ]; then for f in $changed_tf; do terraform fmt -check "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo "[WARNING] terraform fmt needed: $f"; done; fi

Stop.description: Check Terraform formatting on session end
